menu.heading: Side Run
menu.subtitle: Endless procedural side-scroller
menu.hint: Each chunk is generated by an L-system. Run to the gold marker at the end.
menu.keys: Move: A / D or ← → · Jump: Space or W · Restart: R · Menu: Esc

death.heading: You fell
death.hint: You dropped off the track. Confirm to retry this chunk from the start.

chunkComplete.heading: Chunk clear
chunkComplete.hint: Press Enter to run the next chunk.
